provider: HKUST 2026/27 BSc in Innovation, Design and Technology Major Requirements
note: This supplement binds the first published 2026-27 IDT curriculum to the current BSc in Innovation, Design and Technology Major. It records all 21 fixed Required Courses, every Engineering Fundamental alternative, the complete 13-course Product Management and Entrepreneurship elective list, and every explicitly coded row in the Project-related elective list. The Project-related requirement remains partly open because the official list also permits any ELEC course at 3000 or 4000 level; those anonymous ranges are described but not expanded into a permanent closed pool. TEMG 4940 and TEMG 4950 carry official 3-5 credit ranges, TEMG 4970 carries 1-5, and COMP 4901 carries 0-4, so each uses credits 0 locally and actual attained credits must be used. COMP 2011 appears both as an Engineering Fundamental alternative and as a Project-related elective and is stored once with both roles stated. The official normative pathway link currently returns 404, so no Year or semester placement is inferred. University Common Core, English, Legal Education, and additional courses used to reach 120 credits remain outside this Programme-local supplement.
